description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a predominantly matte black finish and a robust, utilitarian design. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from metal, with visible wear and slight discoloration on the upper receiver, suggesting frequent handling. The rifle features a vertical foregrip for enhanced control, a pistol grip with ergonomic shaping, and a detachable box magazine. There are orange and white markings on the side, likely indicating fire selector positions and manufacturer details. The iron sights are integrated into the top rail, and the barrel is short, making the weapon suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The overall build is solid, with a mix of metal and polymer components for durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a vertical foregrip, ergonomic pistol grip, and visible iron sights. The design features a short barrel, detachable magazine, and orange selector markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, barrel opening, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profile, including the vertical foregrip, pistol grip, magazine, and selector markings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the receiver, rear sight, and the alignment of the grips.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the vertical foregrip, pistol grip, and the magazine slot without selector markings.
